description: King of Persia from 530 BC to 522 BC, known for his conquest of Egypt
Founder of the Achaemenid Empire, known for his vast conquests and establishment of the Persian Empire
Athenian historian and general, author of the History of the Peloponnesian War
Persian satrap and military commander during the Peloponnesian War
Spartan general known for his role in the expedition of the Ten Thousand
Arcadian mercenary leader who served in the Persian army
King of Macedon who created one of the largest empires in ancient history through his military conquests
